data.body: TTRPGs for Trans Rights. 511 digital RPG files for $5 (minimum, you can choose to pay more, as it goes to trans-supporting organizations). Will I play all of these? Of course not. Will I play any? Who knows? But I’ve got em, and I’m glad to see my money go towards supporting trans rights.

data.body:
- can (gasp) things like self-compassion completely change the way someone experiences the same software development "practice"?
